title: Distribution of Health Services Across Australia

transform.calculate: datum.NHSD_SERVICE_TYPE == 'General practice service' || datum.NHSD_SERVICE_TYPE == 'General practice skin cancer service' || datum.NHSD_SERVICE_TYPE == 'Medical deputising service' ? 'Primary Care' : datum.NHSD_SERVICE_TYPE == 'Maternal, child and family health service' ? 'Child & Family Health' : datum.NHSD_SERVICE_TYPE == 'Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander health service' ? 'Indigenous Health' : datum.NHSD_SERVICE_TYPE == 'Hospital service' || datum.NHSD_SERVICE_TYPE == 'Hospital general medicine service' || datum.NHSD_SERVICE_TYPE == 'Hospital pharmacy service' || datum.NHSD_SERVICE_TYPE == 'Hospital-based outpatient clinic' || datum.NHSD_SERVICE_TYPE == 'Emergency department service' ? 'Hospital & Emergency' : datum.NHSD_SERVICE_TYPE == 'Nurse led clinic' || datum.NHSD_SERVICE_TYPE == 'Nurse practitioner led clinic' || datum.NHSD_SERVICE_TYPE == 'Walk-in centre' ? 'Nursing & Walk-in Care' : 'Other'
